RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0034 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Noor Okafor Date of Birth: 23/04/1989 SSN (tokenized): TKN-767267 Annual Income: $89,000 Employer: Umbrella Co Loan Amount: $22,000 Term (months): 60 Branch: Pune Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN14235AL Nissan Leaf 2022 Hybrid Used 17,000 Authorized Signature: Noor Okafor
